title: desmanthus depressus var. acuminatus
intro: Desmanthus depressus var. acuminatus, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Desmanthus depressus var. acuminatus include its ability to support the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote healthy digestion. Desmanthus depressus var. acuminatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in topical applications such as salves and ointments.
